activities.text_title: Roll of Thunder, Hear My Cry

questions.question: Based on the context, what does the word “amenities” mean?

responses.content: Thurston wallace doesn’t want colored folks to shop at his business mr granger is making it hard by asking them more than 50 percent of the cotton
He’s trying to put a stop to colored folks from shopping t Vicksburg and even his own shop
Ruin his businesses means tat poepe wont want to shop there

questions.question: Why does Papa tell Stacey he is “born blessed”?

responses.content: Amenities means how people are addressing each other

activities.text_title: Heroes Every Child Should Know: Perseus

questions.question: Look at paragraphs 46-47. How do Perseus's actions show that he followed Athene's plan?

responses.content: He wrapped medusas head in the gout skin turning his eyes away because if he look into her eyes he would turn into stone and he sprang up in the sky .

questions.question: What does Perseus's response to the Gorgons in paragraph 49 reveal about his state of mind?

responses.content: He followed her plan by taking her words step by step by killing Medusa In Paragraph47 he did what she said because he didn’t look at her and wrapped medusas head in the gout skin turning away so he did her plan

questions.question: In paragraph 49, Perseus calls the sandals “brave.” What does this reveal about Perseus' character in this moment?

responses.content: Perseus state of mind he was afraid because his sandals weren’t working  and he didn’t want t get caught and he thought the sandals were going to fail him

questions.question: Based on Perseus's actions in paragraphs 46 through 47, the reader can conclude that—

responses.content: A. Athene will be pleased with the resolution of the plot's conflict.

questions.question: When Perseus's blood runs cold in paragraph 49, it reveals that he has—

responses.content: C. brief doubt in Athene's plan.
